source_pr.title: *: support select partition for partition table
source_pr.body:
<!--
Thank you for contributing to TiDB! Please read TiDB's [CONTRIBUTING](https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md) document **BEFORE** filing this PR.
-->

### What problem does this PR solve? <!--add issue link with summary if exists-->
support `select partition` syntax, see issue: https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/8414
eg:
```sql
select * from t1 partition (p0,p1)
```

Please merge parser PR first: https://github.com/pingcap/parser/pull/164
Then I will update go.mod in this PR.

### What is changed and how it works?
Add `PartitionNames` to `ast.TableName` and `DataSource`.
Check `PartitionNames` valid when build `buildDataSource`.

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

 - Unit test

Code changes

 - Has exported function/method change

Side effects

Related changes

symptoms: tk.MustQuery("select b from th partition (p0) order by a").Check(testkit.Rows("-6", "-3", "0", "3", "6")) (executor/executor_test.go)
failure_signature: tk.MustQuery("select b from th partition (p0) order by a").Check(testkit.Rows("-6", "-3", "0", "3", "6")) (executor/executor_test.go)
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky because it relied on nondeterministic result ordering (e.g., missing ORDER BY / unsorted assertions). Result ordering is not guaranteed unless explicitly enforced. This PR stabilizes it by: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.
fix_pattern: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.

evidence: evidence: tk.MustQuery("select b from th partition (p0) order by a").Check(testkit.Rows("-6", "-3", "0", "3", "6")) (executor/executor_test.go)

files: cmd/explaintest/r/select.result, cmd/explaintest/t/select.test, ddl/ddl.go, ddl/ddl_api.go, ddl/partition.go, executor/executor_test.go, go.mod, go.sum, planner/core/errors.go, planner/core/logical_plan_builder.go, planner/core/logical_plans.go, planner/core/rule_partition_processor.go, table/table.go, table/tables/partition.go
